$doc: BMD-derived input→output pairs for LB Margin — the sum of specified qs_CashFlow columns across monthly rows. Used by ehc_contracts.metrics.lb_margin and the Board Auditor's independent replicas at recalculate_metrics.py (sum_metric_by_segment:201, sum_metric_grouped:238, recompute_ratios:309, compute_report_row_values:2954). Formula 1 uses FLOW_COLS (9-col, includes Plat_Fee + Cost_Hiatus); Formula 2 uses LB_MARGIN_COLS (7-col, excludes Plat_Fee + Cost_Hiatus, per Jeff's A1 ruling for origination_detail). P vs F is determined by which cashflow table the caller passes in — the formulas themselves are type-agnostic. Tolerance: ±1e-6 absolute on the total dollar amount. Phase 4.5 ratification 2026-04-22.
tolerance_description: Absolute tolerance on the LB Margin total in dollars. 1e-6 well below the BMD's ±$1 display tolerance and absorbs float-summation-order jitter across implementations. Per Phase 4.5 ratification 2026-04-22.

cases.name: simple_single_row_flow
cases.description: Single month with revenue 1000 and all other columns zero. 9-col formula sums to 1000.

cases.name: single_row_full_9col
cases.description: Single month with every 9-col field nonzero. Revenue 1000, costs -600 total, Plat_Fee 50, Cost_Hiatus 25, TrueUp 10, Other_SU 5. Margin = 1000 - 600 + 50 + 25 + 10 + 5 = 490.

cases.name: single_row_7col_excludes_plat_hiatus
cases.description: Same single row as above but using 7-col formula — Plat_Fee (50) and Cost_Hiatus (25) are excluded. Margin = 1000 - 600 + 10 + 5 = 415.

cases.name: multi_row_9col
cases.description: Three months of cashflow. 9-col sum across all rows and columns. Revenue: 500+700+300 = 1500. Cost: -100-200-150 total per month = -450 each × 3 = -1350. Fees across all months: 30. Margin = 1500 - 1350 + 30 = 180.

cases.name: plat_hiatus_divergence
cases.description: A row where Plat_Fee (100) and Cost_Hiatus (50) are material but all other columns are zero. Proves 9-col and 7-col produce different numbers on the SAME input: 9-col = 150, 7-col = 0. This is the one case that exists solely to exercise the column-set divergence.

cases.name: plat_hiatus_divergence_7col
cases.description: Same row as plat_hiatus_divergence but 7-col. Plat_Fee and Cost_Hiatus excluded — result is 0.

cases.name: total_loss
cases.description: Costs only, no revenue. All four cost columns -500 across two rows, no fees. 9-col: 2 × (-2000) = -4000. Margin is negative (realistic for early-project months). Proves sign discipline holds.

cases.name: large_fund_magnitude
cases.description: Realistic fund-scale magnitudes. One month of fund-total: Revenue +25M, costs -18M, Plat_Fee +500k, Cost_Hiatus +250k, TrueUp +100k, Other_SU +75k. 9-col margin = 7.925M.

cases.name: trueup_positive_and_negative
cases.description: TrueUp column can be positive or negative. Two rows: first has +200 TrueUp, second has -300 TrueUp. Net TrueUp contribution is -100. Revenue and costs net to +500. 9-col margin = 400.

cases.name: trueup_included_in_both
cases.description: TrueUp IS included in both FLOW_COLS and LB_MARGIN_COLS. This case uses both column sets to assert that TrueUp -50 shows up in both. Revenue 500, costs 0, TrueUp -50. 9-col = 450, 7-col = 450.

edge_cases.name: empty_rows
edge_cases.description: Empty rows iterable returns 0.0 — sum semantics, not None semantics. Distinct from IRR/MOIC which return None on empty because a ratio is undefined; LB Margin is a sum and an empty sum is exactly 0.

edge_cases.name: missing_columns_treated_as_zero
edge_cases.description: Rows with some 9-col keys missing entirely. Missing keys contribute 0. Revenue 1000, no other columns present. Margin = 1000.

edge_cases.name: none_values_treated_as_zero
edge_cases.description: Rows with None/NA values in some columns. None contributes 0. Revenue 1000, Cost_Land None, rest 0. Margin = 1000.

edge_cases.name: nan_treated_as_zero
edge_cases.description: Rows with NaN values. NaN contributes 0 (defense in depth — production callers pre-filter). Revenue 1000, Cost_Land NaN, rest 0. Margin = 1000.

edge_cases.name: single_row_all_zeros
edge_cases.description: Single row with all 9-col keys set to 0. Margin = 0.0 (legitimate zero, not missing).
